blinding.data_scope: Run2012B/C TauPlusX rows in the localized public HiggsTauTauReduced mirror; 11.467/fb is retained as the Open Data normalization reference
blinding.phase5_audit_correction: Added same-sign QCD/fake background, multivariate input reweighting, and wider DY/Z normalization before promoting the calibrated score fit.

qcd_sideband_estimate.category_assignment: rederived VBF/boosted/zero-jet rules for control-region rows
limitations: No anti-isolated tau branch is available in the selected-event artifact.
The transfer factor is measured in the lowest observable bin and propagated globally.
The VBF MC-background control scale is applied before non-QCD subtraction.
QCD shape-statistical uncertainties are recorded for validation but not expanded into per-bin pyhf nuisances in the final workspace.
qcd_sideband_estimate.method: same-sign low-mT data minus non-QCD MC, transferred to opposite-sign signal candidates

transfer_sideband.description: lowest fitted-observable bin, chosen as the most signal-depleted control bin

QCDSameSignDataDriven.method: same-sign low-mT data minus non-QCD MC, transferred to opposite-sign signal candidates

vbf_background_scale.application: central scale applied only to MC background samples in the VBF fit category
vbf_background_scale.data_scope: VBF-like rows with top-btag handle outside the low-mT signal region
